entry.title: Re: Beating the Odds: How SAP Skills Shaped Luca’s Career Despite a Struggling Economy
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing this story! It's great to see the digital skills initiative making an impact here.

Anyone else interested in signing up for our digital skills initiative can go here.

entry.title: Re: Consume Reuse Component
entry.content:
Hi @SureshRa ,

I was able to deploy my lib project to my on prem system. How is the correct way to load the lib from the on prem system instead of the local BAS project. Maybe this would be helpful addition to your nice blog post 🙂

 

Thanks

Regards

Alex

entry.title: Plan to upgrade Crystal report Server 2016 to Crystal report Server 2020 to a different server
entry.content: I would like to migrate our existing crystal report server 2016 environment to a new windows 2023 server. I had installed the crystal report 2020 trial version in the new windows 2023 server. But I do not know how to migrate the reports/schedules/users/groups/folders/permissions from the old server to new server by keeping everything intact. Would you please share me your thoughts on this scenario? Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: The Sales Order Confirmation PDF Output lack the cust...

HI,

Thank you very very much for your suggestion . its working

entry.title: Re: How to connect with "Microsoft Power Apps" or "Micros...
entry.content:
Hi @Martin-Pankraz 

Thank you for your reply.
Recently, I started studying "Integration Suite" and "Microsoft Power Platform".
For that reason, I'm sorry that my understanding is insufficient.
Therefore, I would like to ask the following questions again.
① Push type scenario
(1)Click the button installed in Power Apps. (trigger)
(2) Power Automate will start and retrieve the preset "Dataverse" data.
(3) Obtain information using "Cloud integration (integration flow)" for which HTTP connection settings have been made in advance from the "HTTP connector" set in advance in Power Automate.
(*Are you not using "SAP Open Connectors" or "SAP API Management"?)

②Pull type scenario
(1) Actions on the “Integration Suite” side (event mesh, etc. (trigger))
(2) Connect to “Dataverse” using “Cloud Integration (Integration Flow)” (*Using “Open Connector”?)
I couldn't figure out how to connect to "Microsoft Power Automate" or "Dataverse" using "Open Connectors".

I would like to know more details if possible.
Best Regards.
Yuya

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite; Iterate over Value and write i...
entry.content:
@Ryan-Crosby Thanks for your help. I have done it now a little bit different but it is working like i want it to work.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM
entry.content: Hi Ajit, good day! our warehouse with MFS and automated. BIN depth is front and behind bin, for stock removal case outbound, warehouse task created by ADHU(Mass creation also) for the behind bin pallet, but already front bin have pallet and no warehouse task for front one. that is resource while trying to access pallet from behind bin for existing WT, error throws front bin blocked /occupied. Solution to be provided is at ADHU while creating WT need to validate if front bin occupied and no WT, then internal transfer this front pallet to same SKU other destination bin. after that behind bin pallet WT will continue to removal., advance thanks for the valuable suggestion.

entry.title: Re: Service Consumption Model 2 for OData Client Proxy
entry.content:
Hi @hendrikp 

 

that is a good point. I will create a backlog item for this. You will find examples in the SAP help:
https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/expand-option?locale=en-US&version=Cloud 
https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/odata-request-deep-create?locale=en-US&version=Cloud 

It would also be nice to have a link to the help portal from the SCM editor in ADT.



Best regards
Bernhard

entry.title: Re: User Assignment in SAC using SCIM API is failing for...
entry.content:
Jagan

Firstly, thank you so much for posting here. It will help organise our discussion better than comments to a blog post.

I would be amazed if the problem was with the SCIM API, it's almost certain the issue is with your hosting ABAP application. 

To update team membership, you must use the /Groups/TEAMID endpoint. There are different workflows you could use to add users, for example, you could add a user at a time, or you could add many users. I discuss this in a great deal in my best practices article 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/boc/3354605866.html#SAPAnalyticsCloudUserandTeamProvisioningSCIMAPIBestPracticeandAPIPerformance-Teamupdates

My article suggests the most optimised means to update a team and my sample script uses all the best practices. For example, I share that adding 500 users to an empty team could take 13 seconds, instead of 13 minutes!  So it will be interesting to see if the ABAP program has been used as its basis. Did you use my sample scripts and did it adopt the best practice? 

The scim API was also updated recently and this allows for a PATCH request this is handy if you need to make the logic very simple in your application since only a single request is needed. There would be no need to GET and then PUT, it can all be done in a single PATCH request. You might find my blog handy to explain some other improvements that have come with the scim API update. https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-analytics-cloud-scim-api-version-1-and-2-high-level-comparison/ba-p/13578698

Do feel free to share more details. My SAP colleagues will also be happy to forward an email to me, so we can discuss this directly if you think that would help.

All the best

Matthew

entry.title: Re: Planning strategy for header material VC and SFG MTS
entry.content: Hi, You can use this strategy for KMAT FG also without variants. When you maintain the PIR for FG without usage probabilities for characteristics, FG BOM will explode only with the underlying SFG in case if it is the only component without object dependencies. (PIR>Schedule lines >configuration supporting point).

entry.title: Re: Please help guide me
entry.content: you can look for freelancing or consulting jobs that you can do on the side with your current job, that sounds like a more easier route to me

entry.title: Instance Sync & Configure People Profile.
entry.content:
Hello

I am going to share one of the issues faced while moving the Configure People profile changes from one instance to another. We have selected the EmployeeProfilePageConfig in MDF Object definitions and moved the same. However, on checking on target system we could find that the changes were not transported, and we were getting an error as in note 3409204.However as per note we would have to make some changes to the object by going in to Manage Data-->EmployeeProfilePageConfig .However on checking the same there were no results. As a solution we did move the data using MDF Data-->EmployeeProfilePageConfig then we could see the object in Manage data and also the configuration in "Configure People Profile" as expected.

Hence be sure to move the data as well for changes to appear in Configure People Profile Page.

we want to build an app via SAP Build and use it as a mashup in SAP Sales & Service Cloud v2. We want to pass the currently selected customer number to the app. In our case it's: Give us all equipments linked to that specific customer from SAP S/4HANA

Do you have any idea whether this can be realized and how this can be implemented? Thank you in advance!

Best Regards

Sebastian

SAP Build SAP Build Apps

entry.title: Re: TU transaction in SAP EWM S4/HANA

entry.title: Re: Re-assign a WI to a different WP?
entry.content:
Hello Marianne, 

Please see point 3 of the following KBA: 

2894753 - Focused Build: Performing advanced functionalities for Work Items

It should be possible to reassign Work Items in status "Successfully Tested", status "Handover to release" is the point of no return.

It shouldn't be necessary to decouple the transport requests as long as the Work Package you are swapping to is assigned to a release using the same landscape.

Please note there needs to be at least one Work Item assigned to the Work Package after the reassignment, so a dummy Work Item may be needed to facilitate the reassignment. 

I hope this information is helpful.

Regards,
Kerrie
SAP Product Support

entry.title: Re: "Statement is not accessible." - Error
entry.content: check if the query is inside START-OF-SELECTION ... END-OF-SELECTION, you could check if the previous query has ended with dot(.)

entry.title: Re: Picking

Hello Bilkiss

Already confirmed ? do you mean already picked ? in that case you do cancel pick , else please explain in detail 

BR Shazeb

entry.title: Supporting crypto agility with the BTP Trust Store
entry.content:
You have all heard that change is the new normal. This is true in many ways, including for IT security. Whether it is the cryptographic algorithm, the key length, or an individual key, we must always be ready to change to something “better”, namely more secure. This might not even be due to an attack, but rather be part of continuous efforts to stay ahead of all potential threats.

When it comes to protocols like Transport Layer Security (TLS), the level of security also depends on the root certificates that are the anchor of trust for the TLS-protected communication. In the past, the validity of root certificates could be decades, so a change would be a once in a lifetime thing. Today however, even though the root certificates are not really short-lived, they will still have to be replaced now and then.

Changing the trust anchor of communication in a large landscape requires some preparation, to ensure that everybody can communicate securely and without disruption. If you miss to update the trust configuration across all involved parties, then the change of a root certificate may cause an outage for all scenarios that rely on the trust.

When SAP changes the root certificates that are the trust anchors of BTP, we ensure that all scenarios inside the platform are ready, and the communication is not affected. However, you may also have clients or 3rd party applications that integrate with BTP. For these, the trust is not managed by SAP and so you need to take matters into your own hands.

With the new BTP Trust Store, we want to help you avoid outages by providing information about changes in the trust anchors of SAP BTP early. This gives you the time to roll out new root certificates before they become mandatory.

You will find the required root certificates in several well-known formats in the BTP Trust Store at https://github.com/sap-software/btp-trust-store

The trust store includes 2 sets of root certificates:

The “Required” root certificates are mandatory for all clients or services that communicate via TLS with SAP BTP-based services. Ensure that your clients or services trust these root certificates, and that changes to the list of root certificates are reflected early on your side, such as once per quarter. This will ensure that you can continue to communicate with BTP even if SAP changes root certificates over time.

The “Optional” set of root certificates represents the SAP Global Trust List provided by SAP Global Security, as documented in SAP Note 2801396.

entry.title: Are there any best practice guidelines for client-specific Customizing in EML for S/4HANA?
entry.content:
Are there any best practice guidelines, recommendations, or restrictions suggested by SAP for client-specific Customizing or Configuration in the Enterprise Management Layer (EML) for SAP S/4HANA greenfield implementation? Or can the Customizing be done similarly to any other S/4HANA On-Premise implementations?

RISE with SAP SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud SAP S/4HANA SAP Activate 

@Petra_Ohlinger

entry.title: Re: Running Hana Express on M1 Macs
entry.content:
Works great, thank you.
However, to execute more demanding scripts I had to check Force Multicore box in System settings and manually set number of cores otherwise Hana became unresponsive. 
"Force multicore must be selected when attempting to emulate multiple cores of a strong memory system on a weak memory system (strong-on-weak). A typical example of strong-on-weak is attempting to emulate x86_64/i386 on an ARM host. In these cases, QEMU does not guarantee the correctness of the emulation. You must also manually specify the number of cores when forcing multicore."

entry.title: Re: User Assignment in SAC using SCIM API is failing for...
entry.content: Thank you, but I think the question is about SCIM rather than SAML. Both can be used for user to team assignment, though the SAML option is very popular, it means the assignment of the team only occurs at the time of the user login and not before. SCIM resolves this problem and a few others. Your blog is handy though for those that want to understand the SAML option for team assignment, so thanks for sharing that. All the best, Matthew

I did not want to wait until then to tell you, your response is astonishingly excellent. You seem to have covered all the details needed, with exceptional awareness and focus on the perspective I happen to have. This response demonstrates a special gift for writing support information. I will let you know how it goes when I try applying what you have written.

entry.title: Re: How change the Iview property -> SAP Gui Type in Mass...
entry.content:
Hi,

There is no way to change the iView property in mass, you have to go one by one in eacj iView and do the changes.

Regards,

Rohit Gera

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud: Custom Widget & Widget Add-Ons Samples Preview
entry.content:
Background 

Now that Custom Widget is available with the Unified Story Experience since QRC/Q2 - 2023, and Widget Add-Ons since QRC/Q4 - 2023, we received a large amount of requests coming from SAC users searching for Samples in order to extend the Built-in set of visualisations in SAC.

In this article, I will highlight the Ready-To-Use Custom Widget Samples available in the SAP Public GitHub repository which you can download, edit and consume within SAP Analytics Cloud. You can use these Samples as a starting point to learn how to develop Custom Widget.

In addition I will highlight a Widget Add-on sample which you can use in order to extend the visual elements of the Built-in charts such a Bar chart, and with that you will have the possibility to modify the Tooltip or the Plot area by overwriting existing visual elements content or style.

Note: this article will be always updated every time we develop new Custom Widget Sample. Feel free to let us know your most requested visualisation that you wish to see as Custom Widget in the future in the comment section. Partners and Customers who wants to include their Custom Widget or Widget Add-on samples in this article, they can contact me so I can refer to their blog posts, and with that we can gather more type of visualisation and make it visible for everyone.

Custom Widget Samples: Preview

The Custom Widget Samples that I will preview in this article, are ready to be used within your Story. You can download the resource files and then upload it into your SAC tenant.

You can edit the Custom Widgets by modifying the source code from the resource files if it's required or even extend the Custom Widget by adding new web component files like: Styling.js, in case you wish adding some new settings to the sample. So let's get started with the first preview of our Samples.

Sankey Chart

You can download the Sankey Chart from here, upload it into your SAC tenant, add it to your Unified Story Experience (Optimized mode), from the builder panel, select your data model, set measure, set an hierarchical dimension and edit the default colors of the different depths from the Styling panel.

You can refer to this sample in case you want to understand how to add new settings into the Styling panel by creating the Styling.js file.

Gauge Chart

 

You can download the Gauge Chart from here, upload it into your SAC tenant, add it to your Unified Story Experience (Optimized mode), from the builder panel, select your data model, set your measure and from the styling panel set your threshold.

Custom Pie Chart

You can download the Custom Pie Chart from here, upload it into your SAC tenant, add it to your Unified Story Experience (Optimized mode), from the builder panel, select your data model, set your measure and your dimension. 

Bar Gradient Chart

You can download the Bar Gradient Chart from here, upload it into your SAC tenant, add it to your Unified Story Experience (Optimized mode), from the builder panel, select your data model, set your measure and your dimension. 

Funnel Chart

You can download the Funnel Chart from here, upload it into your SAC tenant, add it to your Unified Story Experience (Optimized mode), from the builder panel, select your data model, set your measure and your dimension. You can export the Funnel chart as image from the top right icons, or also edit the data values.

Nested Pie Chart

You can download the Nested Pie Chart from here, upload it into your SAC tenant, add it to your Unified Story Experience (Optimized mode), from the builder panel, select your data model, set your measure and your dimension.

Datepicker

You can download the Datepicker from here. This Custom Widget provides a sophisticated input field for date values and date ranges. The date formatting is customizable and a dark mode is provided.

 Line Chart

You can download the Line Chart from here, upload it into your SAC tenant, add it to your Unified Story Experience (Optimized mode), from the builder panel, select your data model, set your measure and your dimension.

Half Doughnut Chart

You can download the Half Doughnut Chart from here, upload it into your SAC tenant, add it to your Unified Story Experience (Optimized mode), from the builder panel, select your data model, set your measure and your dimension.

File Upload Widget

The file upload widget extends upon the Data Import API to allow users to upload their FactData CSV or Excel datasets to public and private versions. The widget serves as an intermediary tool, parsing the file and sending the data contained within it to the Data Import API. You can refer to this blog to know more about this Custom Widget.

Widget Add-on Samples: Preview

The Widget Add-on Samples are also ready to be used within your Story. You can download the resource files and upload it into your SAC tenant, then from the builder panel you can add the widget add-on to the supported charts to modify the tooltip or the plot area. Learn more how to enable the widget add-on within your story here.

Sample 1

You can download this sample from here, upload it into your SAC tenant, add your supported chart (such Bar chart) into the canvas, enable the widget add-on from the builder panel and add your plot area and tooltip. you can edit either the tooltip or the plot area in the design time, but modify the settings from the builder panel, for example you can change the default icons with your own ones.

More blogs to check out 👇

  • How to use Linked Analysis with Custom Widget
  • Custom Widget Hands-on Guide 2023
  • Announcing the new SAP Analytics Cloud feature: Widget Add-on
  • Hosting and Uploading Custom Widgets Resource Files into SAP Analytics Cloud
  • Custom Widget Samples GitHub Repository

entry.title: Re: Error in Trigger

entry.title: Re: How Can I Find Detailed Instructions on Setting up Pr...

entry.title: Re: SAP Portal upgrade from current version SAP NW 7.50,...
entry.content:
Hi Prasad,

Below will be the Pre and Post Checks of SP Upgrade:

  • Test all the System Alias.
  • Test all the destination in nwa.
  • Check all the custom Portal applicaiton and keep the back up of the applicaiton.
  • Test the JCO's Destination if any.
  • Test and verify the SAP Backend certificate.

These are basic activities which you have to perofrom as Pre and Post Upgrade. As it is SP upgrade so there wont be much imact on the system.

 

Regards,

Rohit Gera

So I thought this error-driven behaviour could help with your requirement. And yes, this would affect other key figures as well.

entry.title: Event sender stopped, it gives SAP B1iP detected errorInternal Reason:Name expected: 0x7d (:m
entry.content:
Hi,

SAP Event sender stopped running. Before some days it was working. When start Event sender setup wizard. It gives following Error. 

Error gives by Event sender from B1if:SAP B1iP detected an error:Emitted HTTP-Code:500 - Internal Server Error

Internal Reason:

Name expected: 0x7d (:main:, row:2, col:180)

Recommendation:
Check for the correctness of your activity or environment or ask your system-administrator for further help.

Full Internal Error Message:

com.sap.b1i.xcellerator.XcelleratorException: XCE001 Nested exception:
com.sap.b1i.bizprocessor.BizProcException: BPE001 Nested exception: com.sap.b1i.utilities.UtilException: UTE001 Nested exception: com.sap.engine.lib.xml.parser.ParserException: Name expected: 0x7d(:main:, row:2, col:180)

 

Log-ID:

LID24022810582451406050C0A8100A7F9B

Thanking you in advance,

entry.title: Re: [SAP B1] License and Authorization Concern
entry.content:
Hi,

As far as I know, the authorization system and the license system are two separate layers that determine what a user can see and do.

Theoretically, when you set authorizations for a user, with a professional license assigned, these settings will remain when you change the license type to a limited one. The only effect should be that certain functionality will be blocked all of a sudden. When you change the license type to professional later on, all will look the same, but the previously blocked functionality will now be accesible again.

Fortunately it is relatively easy to create a demo company. Just create a new empty database, and restore a backup of your production database on top of it (with overwrite). Once you have this test database, you can simply test it.

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: How to Choose the Control Account When Creating Journ...
entry.content:
@Johan_H,

When using the SAP client or even DTW, we are able to choose the Control Account where the BP will be booked.



See in the screenshot above. Once you select the BP Code, SAP retrieves the default Control Account set up in the BP Master Data on "Accounts Receivable". On the JE second row, we are crediting the same BP, but using a different control account instead. This is widely used when transferring balances between two control accounts. Another business case is when your accounting has different control accounts to accommodate different transactions, so your Loan postings will be booked in a different account than your Receivables, even when the BP is the same. So the same Business Partner may hold different balances, for different purposes.

Basically, the issue is that Import from Excel feature doesn't seem to give the option of changing the control account to be posted, as I've demonstrated above from the GUI.

I hope it makes sense.

Felipe

entry.title: Date Dimension in SAC
entry.content:
Hi 

I have story filter FY Period hierarchy selection and Date dimension also maintain Fiscal year period hierarchy as default hierarchy. My Date dimension data as below (Calendar year Month is Key value).

Date Dimension DataFiscal Year Period Hierarchy Setting

I am calculating simple multiplication of two KFs and saving to another KF through advance formula.  I have created FYMonth_Input parameter with settings (Hierarchy: fiscal Year period, Level: Any). 

MEMBERSET [d/CompCode] = (%CCODE_Input%)
MEMBERSET [d/SalesGroup] = (%SGroup_Input%)
MEMBERSET [d/Date] = (BASEMEMBER([d/Date].[h/FYP], %FYMonth_Input%))

DATA([d/Measures] = "Sales_Output") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Sales_Input", [d/CompCode] = %CCODE_Input%, [d/SalesGroup] = %SGroup_Input%) * RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Sales_Forecast", [d/CompCode] = %CCODE_Input%, [d/SalesGroup] = %SGroup_Input%)

The advance formula working and providing multiplication of two KFs. But I would like to add Date parameter as well in RESULTLOOKUP, but it is not allowing me to add Date parameter.

The story filter will pass the Date parameter value, hence I would like to include Date parameter as well in RESULTLOOKUP to get the KF values for same fiscal year period.

I don't know how it works, The RESULTLOOKUP will consider the MEMBERSET [d/Date] parameter input or not. If not consider KF values will aggregate other months which is not correct. 

And If I change FY Period Parameter settings  level to Leaf (Hierarchy: fiscal Year period, Level: Leaf), then it allowing to add Date parameter in RESULTLOOKUP, This time MEMBERSET [d/Date] is just reading from parameter not from hierarchy structure (not like above code).

MEMBERSET [d/CompCode] = (%CCODE_Input%)
MEMBERSET [d/SalesGroup] = (%SGroup_Input%)
MEMBERSET [d/Date] = (%FYMonth_Input%)
DATA([d/Measures] = "Sales_Output") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Sales_Input", [d/CompCode] = %CCODE_Input%, [d/SalesGroup] = %SGroup_Input%, [d/Date] = (%FYMonth_Input%)) * RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Sales_Forecast", [d/CompCode] = %CCODE_Input%, [d/SalesGroup] = %SGroup_Input%, [d/Date] = (%FYMonth_Input%))

There is no errors in code but it is not providing any result.

Please explain me, why this code is not working even it allowed Date parameter in RESULTLOOKUP.

And the first code is working without allowing Date parameter in RESULTLOOKUP but my worry is may aggregate the KF values to other months.

Regards,

Vasu

entry.title: Re: API operations for Custom Business Objects in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Varun,

Thanks for the detailed blog, is it possible to call the CBO inbound service url in the badi implementation in custom logic app to post an entry in CBO? could you please share how to achieve this?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano,

I hope this email finds you well. My name is Dang Hai NGUYEN, and I am currently working as a .NET Developer at Lotte Data Communication in Vietnam. I am writing to express my interest in obtaining a free voucher for the SAP CER01 certification exam.

As a dedicated professional in the SAP ecosystem, I believe that obtaining this certification would significantly enhance my skills and contribute to my career growth. However, due to financial constraints, I find the exam fee to be challenging.

I have thoroughly prepared for the CER01 exam and am eager to demonstrate my competence in SAP technologies. I kindly request your assistance in providing me with a free voucher for this certification.

I have completed the learning journey of Explore Integrated Business Processes in SAP S4/HANA.

I have already registered with my email: dangnh@lotte.vn

If there are any additional steps or requirements, please let me know, and I will promptly comply.

Thank you for considering my request. I look forward to your positive response.

Thanks and Best regards,

Dang Hai NGUYEN

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere , Dataflow read from CSV, random numbe...
entry.content:
The final solution in my case is:

- Set the target table as "in memory".

- Change a data type inside the dataflow, at the first block that contains the csv file: I had a column with integer values in the CSV file that was read as DECIMAL(13,3). => I change the column type to int32.

Solved applying both of these options. I don't know what components are behind this:

if the change in source object inside the dataflow maybe trigger some rebuild of links somewhere in technical schemas in hana cloud, or the in memory option avoid packet missing in some communications...

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Absence Counting Rules 2.0 in Time Management - 2H 2023
entry.content:
Hi @PriyankaAgarwal,

Thank you very much for this blog, it is very helpful.

But I have 2 questions regarding this topic:

1. As I see Country-specific Employee time fields are not available in the Absence Counting Rule. For example work capacity field for Netherland. Is it a limitation?

2. This new counting approach doesn't affected Time sheet\Time tracking. Do we have any opportunity to use the deduction quantity or factor in time sheet? Now when I calculate the new quantity it looks absolutely good in the Time off UI, but in the Time sheet UI we have the data according to the planning time.

entry.title: Re: Tables to see credit data of the customer.
entry.content:
Credit tables for Scoring and segments ( risk, exposure, rule..):

KMBP_CMS
UKMCASEATTR00
UKMBP_CMS_SGM

entry.title: Re: Error in Trigger
entry.content:
Hi tgyc001, 

Do you have UDO registered for this table?

If yes, you should check the Object/Object ID column in the table. You need to use the Object/Object ID value in the Transaction Notification code.

CC: @Johan_H 

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: How can I add Internal Price at item level to outboun...
entry.content:
Hello, 

Have a look at the similar question and relevant suggestion here: Statistical Condition types print in INVOIC01 Idoc - SAP Community

Thanks,

entry.title: ATC Pseudo comment not working
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We are doing S/4 HANA Conversion. When we are checking ATC and I applied Pseudo comment. When I restart my ATC, I am still seeing this on my ATC list. How I can fix it?

TABLES  : faglflext.   "#EC CI_USAGE_...

faglflext table was a transpalent table, it changed with CDS View with same name, is it about this?

entry.title: Software in This Forum Needs To Be Easier to Use Without Producing Bogus Responses
entry.content:
Outstanding Excellence of This Forum, Even with These Problems 

This forum is one of the finest forums on the internet in terms of the value of the content and the quality of how content is presented using the forum's tools. Unfortunately, these extraordinary achievements are tarnished by some hard-to-avoid flaws in the editing tools.

I have used more than 100 different forums since the internet first started providing this sort of application. I also have a special interest in this kind of software. This is how I know I am qualified to offer the evaluation I just posted. My hope is the outstanding development capability at SAP will be applied to taking the necessary steps to boost this application into a level of excellence very few have a realistic opportunity to achieve. If you do this, this site will be appreciated and respected at a very high level, instead of now being seen as a mixed bag of excellence with some unfortunate and unnecessary flaws.

The two contacts I had with the flaws appear in the first question I have posted since this site was updated with significant improvements a few months ago. When the upgrade was applied, I was already seeing a level of excellence much greater than what I thought was realistic to expect. None of my assignments at my employer required the use of SAP products since the update was applied here, until yesterday

Problems Appeared!

.The question I posted yesterday is at this URL: There was no problem when I posted the question.

Someone wrote a fabulous response to the question. This is where the flaws arose. The first problem I saw was a horrible block of code posted wrapped in a narrow column of a tall, thin object with a pink background. I don't know what I did to cause that, but it was hideous. I tried three times to delete it by clicking on an X icon in the upper right of the object, which caused nothing to happen, that I could see. It was as if the X icon was a dead image. Now, the pink blob is gone. I wonder if clicking on the X icon actually deleted the nasty object but failed to respond in any way when I clicked on it, but then later had the effect of deleting the object. The pink blob, the attached image, I cannot now see how to place where it belongs in this post.

The other problem was reported by the expert writer who posted a fantastic answer to my question. That person added a note that said: "I answered this question. Then I edited my answer to format some code. And now my answer is gone. No draft, nothing." The odd thing about this is I see two copies of the answer posted in the thread I started. I suspect that like the apparently dead X icon on my nasty pink blob, the person's excellent answer might have been recovered but not made visible at the relevant time.

Most software shops lack the commitment to excellence needed for you to investigate the problems I am reporting. The usual mistake is to assume the problem is isolated to the other person and me because you are not getting many notices like this one. It takes a long time to write this notice, and most of the time, people don't put the time in to provide this feedback. I will bet anyone with the courage the problems I am reporting affect many users of this forum. I sincerely hope you fix it.

entry.title: Re: Absence Counting Rules 2.0 in Time Management - 2H 2023
entry.content:
Hi @mgroshevaya ,

Yes, the country specific subnodes of Employee Time are not available with absence counting rules. Could you please explain the use case why you need to check for work capacity and why a time type specific absence counting rule is not sufficient?

Regarding point 2, it is planned in our roadmap to include the deduction quantity in time valuation. Please also create an influence request for this one so we can prioritize accordingly.

 

Kind Regards,

Priyanka

entry.title: Re: How Can I Find Detailed Instructions on Setting up Pr...
entry.content: I posted a notice of the problems with the forum post editor at this link: https://community.sap.com/t5/questions-about-sap-websites/software-in-this-forum-needs-to-be-easier-to-use-without-producing-bogus/qaq-p/13622231

entry.title: Re: The new Simplify withholding tax on IRRF table - Country: Brazil
entry.content:
Mestre luis_freire,

Apliquei a nota 3415449 e não esta calculando o desconto simplificado, é preciso fazer mais algum passo como por exemplo no BP?

Att:

Rogério Garcia.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,
I am interested in joining the program as a developer looking to change the course of my career in the middle of my life due to the war in my country - Ukraine. Up to this point, I have accumulated significant experience in developing programs for automating business processes and accounting for economic activities of companies in various industries. I believe that transitioning from a developer on the 1C platform to a SAP developer will bring maximum benefit both for me and my potential clients.

entry.title: Re: How to create Authorization Group ID to define allowl...
entry.content:
You would configure the system via the CBC system (central business configuration) assuming you just got the system. Please go to the app "Manage your solution" with the BPC Expert role and it will give you the link to the CBC system. Talk to your admin to get access to it if you don't have access. 

Here is a learning path on it https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/configuring-asset-management-processes-in-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition/introducing-sap-central-business-configuration_e6a66dd4-32aa-4272-9b05-ac37766782bd

Here are the help pages https://help.sap.com/docs/CENTRAL_BUSINESS_CONFIGURATION

Regards

Dennis

entry.title: Asset acquisition entry not reflected in Income tax depreciation report.
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have created a block Z1000 for vehicles TICK THE PUT TO USE check box and have gave the rate for the block

Transaction types have been maintained as follows

Have created the asset master and India specific tab have entered the put to use date

Have acquired the asset on same date

Now while updating the transaction details the acquisition has not been updated.

Note : Fiscal year is April - march

Please suggest.

FIN Asset Accounting

entry.title: Re: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance: Cloud or On-Premise? Not an “either or” option, but a str
entry.content:
Hi Gaurav,

search with "note" in the Supported Submission Type column. It will only show the web service submission that require a last mile provider.

entry.title: Dynamic Programm
entry.content:
hi im trying to write a code with radio buttons.

Problem is that: there are 3 Radio buttons and if i pick one it has to add someone new to my table, other one has to show some one and the last one has to delete it. I wrote a Programm but all of parameters are on the screen and they dont disappear when i chose the other Radiobuttons. Could you help me?

entry.title: Re: List of Incoming Payments with penalties per Customer Query
entry.content:
Hope there is seprate GL in which penalities posted - you can use FBL3N it will work good if in penalty line item customer number is also filled in some filled. If not then Z report can be devloped u can start filtering based on payment document (having customer details) & penalty GL.

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM
entry.content: Hi Ajit Routray, Great thank you for the information in link which I exactly needed. Let me use that details with BAdi to fix the error and explore the information. /SCWM/ADHU used to create warehouse task by Handling unit. I greatly appreciate your valuable time and advise. Thanks again for the wonderful help and greatest information with swift response. How may I contact you if any help needed regards SAP EWM. Thanks!

entry.title: Where to store Malaysia Tax Identification number for e-invoicing in SAP ECC without BP
entry.content:
Hi,

Can someone provide some insights as to where the Malaysia Tax Identification number should be stored in SAP ECC without Business partner? 

Tax category MY7 is recently introduced for this purpose but only applicable for S4. What about clients who are still on SAP ECC and not using business partner? 

Appreciate input.

Thank you.

Kind regards,

Winnie

entry.title: Re: Absence Counting Rules 2.0 in Time Management - 2H 2023
entry.content:
Hi @PriyankaAgarwal 

We have a calculation rule for sick leave for Monday-Friday: Standard weekly hours / 8 * (1 - Work capacity which added to sick leave (country-specific field for the Netherland)). I have a workaround for that problem, I can make a custom field for the Employee Time and the problem will be solved. 

Thank you, for your answers!

entry.title: no contact until resubmission checked still showing in worklist sap
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Can anyone advise how to remove "no contact until resubmission checked" items from worklist in collection Management UDM_SPECIALIST.

Since these items no need to show until the resubmission date.  

Thanks & Regards,

RJ

entry.title: Re: Validation on Transaction Amount T Code FB50
entry.content:
Hello Imran, 

Please check your validation at line item level & is assigned/activated at your company code for callup point 0002 in OB28.

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

we would like to pass sales order to create this billing document.

(we are using S4 HANA public cloud. We are getting data in flat file for creation of BP, SO and Payment details. Using one ODATA based API, we are already creating BP and SO in public cloud)

entry.title: Re: Help and direction
entry.content:
Hi @autiger30 ,

Welcome aboard! Please check out my blog on how to approach the consulting topic.

I will also invite you to our digital skills initiative for a free certification attempt.

Best of luck! Keep in touch and keep me updated on your progress.

Regards,

David

entry.title: Learning Curricula - Fixed due date for everyone including new hires
entry.content:
Hi all, a new requirement has come up within our organisation regarding curriculum due dates.

Let's say we have Curriculum A assigned by an Assignment Profile, and we want to assign it to everyone with a due date of 31st October 2024. If I was just doing this for current employees, I would be able to do this using the initial period from assignment date to result in this due date. However, when we have new starters who also get this training auto-assigned to them, the initial period of X days would still be taken into account and would push the due date later and later. 

Is there a way we can set a fixed due date/required date for a curriculum/curriculum item, so that even if someone joins later in the year, the due/required date is the same?

entry.title: Re: How to make Signal tables sortable?
entry.content:
Dear Anna, 

Thanks for your question! Unfortunately it cannot be answered without any further details and/or examples. I would ask for you create a ticket on SAP For Me (S-user ID requested) and then the support team will be able to help you!

entry.title: Re: Encode/Encrypt Fiori/UI5 URL Parameters
entry.content: Hi I am developer myself, so I do not really know what you mean with "BASIS". What you try to do, encrypten the ID to regulate that someone is not easily able to switch is simply not how it should be designed. Nevertheless using UUID is a way as proposed by me.

entry.title: Re: How Can I Find Detailed Instructions on Setting up Pr...
entry.content: I have added to original question. Next step if for me to apply what you suggested

entry.title: Re: How to make Signal tables sortable?
entry.content: Hi @GiovannaBM, the ticket has already been created and is currently being taken care of.

entry.title: Re: How can I add Internal Price at item level to outboun...
entry.content:
The simple inclusion of the appropriate print indicator (header, item) in the pricing procedure should be enough for the data to appear in E1EDK05 or E1EDP05.  We have several nearly identical pricing procedures and what is available for print or data transfer is entirely controlled by the single indicator.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: Error in Trigger
entry.content:
Hi @tgyc001 ,

Considering your table is registered as a UDO, you have to reference it within SBO_SP_TransactionNotification between quotes. See below:

Regards,

Felipe

entry.title: Re: What is the difference between "tables:X" and "ls_str...
entry.content:
Hi Yalcin,

 

I think the answer is in the documentation: https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_752_index_htm/7.52/en-us/abaptables.htm

 

In ABAP OO "TABLES: [...]" does not work. And yes it creates a flat structure as described in the documentation.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud: Custom Widget & Widget Add-Ons Samples Preview
entry.content:
Hi Marouane,

Great overview!

We would really need ability to also customize table widgets to support advanced planning & reporting requirements in tables/grids (such as ag-grid), for example to achieve better conditional formatting or use scorecard & in-cell charts).
For charts I see a lot of demand for GANTT chart incl. GANTT planning capability and Pareto chart.

entry.title: Re: Hi Maicon , I am facing the similar issue can you ple...
entry.content:
This seems to be a private message, please write the user directly do not use the Q&A section.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

entry.title: Monthly basis job and event based job creation in SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Customer needs assistance in creating two jobs:

  • 1st job
    • should trigger tasks every month
  • 2nd job
    • In this job, there are 3 tasks and each is interdependent.
    • Once 1st is completed the 2nd should be triggered and when the 2nd is completed the 3rd should be triggered.
    • If any tasks fail then it should not trigger the next one.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Monthly basis job and event based job creation in SAP...
entry.content: See SAP Help Scheduler Jobs (.hdbschedulerjob).

entry.title: Re: JAVA Connect SNC with error: No credentials were supplied
entry.content:
The steps you mentioned can be followed when java application is running on-premise system. Do you have steps what needs to be done when application is running on Cloud foundry. My application is running on cloud foundry. App container is having sapcryptolib.so file. While access the application getting exception:

 ERROR GSS-API(maj): No credentials were supplied

 Unable to establish the security context

entry.title: Re: List Report V4 - Hide Copy action button
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I cannot see any action named "Copy" on your screenshot. What do you mean?

The property enablePaste refers to the shortcut ctrl+V (when you copied something using ctrl+C).

So it's not related to copy.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM - KPI is inactive error in BPMon

entry.title: SAP CAP Attachments - data not updated in hana cloud db
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on attachments in sap cap. I am following the below tutorial

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/my-journey-towards-using-ui5-uploadset-with-cap-backend/ba-p/13499427

As per the tutorial, i can able to post and get the attachments. 

when i test i can able to see the data locally as shown below. but i want to see the data in hana cloud db.

Seeing data locally

Connect to local sqlite db

Why this is connecting to sqlite db by default even i have hana cloud db.

Do we need to specify the hana db here?

Please help.

Thanks,

Gowtham

entry.title: Re: parallel sequence in Routing
entry.content: Ok, but how will the po look like? And how should these parallel operations be notified?

entry.title: Re: 🇱🇹 Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA and Python (Vilnius, LT)
entry.content: Are you coming @seVladimirs ? 🙂

entry.title: Deletion of IM (Investment) Program
entry.content:
Hello All,

This Blog will show how to delete a IM program from SAP, this might require during testing or if any IM programs created incorrectly.

Use the T code: IMR3

Provide the IM program and approval year.

Keep the check box on Test run and click on execute button.

Fig 1: Initial Screen

Fig 2: Initial Screen filled with IM program and Approval year

If any errors or warning messages can be analyzed before deleting.

Fig 3: Output with warning message

This indicates there few measures like WBS, orders etc has been assigned to the IM nodes. Before deleting appropriate action can be taken or else can override and delete.

Now, remove the test run and click on the execute.

Fig 4: Initial screen removed the Check box on Test run.

Fig 5: Output screen, deleted the IM program.

Investment program has been deleted.

Now cross check existence of IM program and respective approval year in IM03 or IM23.

Fig 6: Display Investment Program initial screen

So, We have deleted IM program XXX and approval year 2025 using IMR3 t code.

entry.title: SAP MII SSCE How add fixed filter to grid table
entry.content:
Hi,

Can someone tell me how can I set fixed filter for grid tabel in SAP SSCE?

For example I have a table with two columns. I would like to choose only some of the data from set depends of first column. Example:

Table with two columns. First is column with numbers, second is with characters

1 A

2 B

3 C

4 D

 

I want choose only these rows with 2 nad 3 value in column with numbers. Output should look like:

2 B

3 C

 

This should be fixed and people who will use that dashboard can't change it. I use MDO as a data provider for this grid table.

entry.title: Product Updates for SAP Business Application Studio - February 2024 Edition
entry.content:
Dear community,

I'm excited to unveil the latest enhancements to your preferred development environment - SAP Business Application Studio, in our "Product Updates - February 2024 Edition" even though it's already March. Our continued progress is driven by your invaluable feedback, which guides us towards better clarity and higher standards. We know that we couldn’t have been where we are today without your consistent feedback, or as we prefer to call it - our roadmap to better clarity and increased perfection.

Startup Performance Improvement

We've listened carefully, taken note, and acted to address perhaps the one nagging issue our esteemed users have voiced consistently - the startup performance of the dev spaces. Balancing speed, consistency, and stability in the startup process, we are rolling out a significant improvement to transform the way you interact with our development environment.

Akin to a winning sprinter, our modified version of SAP Business Application Studio is designed to take off with speed; the startup time of dev space has been substantially minimized for all dev space types, nudging a quantum leap forward.

In this version, performance isn't just about speed, but it is also a testament to our commitment to serve you better. With your invaluable feedback as our guiding star, we've refined and fine-tuned the application to deliver a performance that is not only better but also much more consistent. This implies a smoother, more harmonious experience, making the switch between various dev space types a breeze.

Stability is another cornerstone of our new version. We've rolled up our sleeves, meticulously ironed out the creases, and emerged with a platform that's more robust and resilient. With better stability, confined to the annals of history are frequent stalls and unexpected glitches, ensuring a more fluid experience to help you maintain your productivity groove and ensure you can work undisrupted.

Session timeout experience

We are equally excited to announce an upgrade in the session timeout experience. For developers engrossed in solving a complex coding problem, any inactivity over an hour or a connection glitch while working in SAP Business Application Studio won't disrupt your workflow anymore. A swift browser refresh will get you right back into your dev space, eradicating the need to navigate via the dev space manager. Additionally, if the dev space has stopped due to extended idleness, you'll be intuitively prompted to start it, completely bypassing the dev space manager.

Session Timeout Experience

Quick Access

We all know SAP Business Application Studio is packed with productivity-boosting tools, enabling seamless and efficient development. These tools facilitate visual designs, connect effortlessly with SAP services and skillfully maintain consistency across various scenarios.

Adding to this convenience, we've launched our Quick Access bar, your go-to tool for common actions. With this feature, you will always find the right tools for your task.

The new Quick Access bar helps you with the next step during development.

When you've finalized the building blocks of the application, our Quick Access bar with widely used actions will assist you with proceeding to the next step. This incredibly handy tool can be accessed from nearly anywhere and used at any point, further simplifying your development process.

The Quick Access bar can be accessed from nearly everywhere within SAP Business Application Studio.

 

New Data Center in Switzerland

We're thrilled to announce the addition of our most recent data center, CH20, in Switzerland North. This newest addition to our infrastructure highlights our unflinching commitment to providing robust and versatile services to our users. The integration of CH20 will further streamline the process of creating business services and applications effortlessly, paving the way for superior data management and security.

CH20 expands our global reach, boosts data availability and redundancy. Users, irrespective of their geographical location, will benefit from enhanced accessibility and efficiency.

For additional details regarding the availability of SAP Business Application Studio and our CH20 data center, visit our official SAP Help section here: https://help.sap.com/docs/bas/sap-business-application-studio/sap-business-application-studio-availability

 

The enhancements on startup performance, session timeout, quick access and the inclusion of new data center CH20, all demonstrate our relentless pursuit to improve your workflow and overall experience with SAP Business Application Studio. We hope these recent updates foster smoother operations, enhanced productivity, and indeed, the satisfaction you deserve.

Remember, this is a journey, and your input is our roadmap. Your partnership is greatly valued, and your success remains our utmost priority.

Happy coding!
